name: UniMart Sprint 3 — Waitlist Notification
description: US-11: Triggered when someone joins the waitlist. Sends a welcome notification and tracks referral counts.

parameters.functionCode: return [{ json: { response: { success: true, message: 'Welcome email queued and referral tracked.', position: $json.position, referral_url: $json.referralUrl } } }];

_meta.note: Connect the webhook URL to the WaitlistLanding.jsx joinWaitlist() function after Supabase insert succeeds.
